task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 data-object-identification artifact. The ground truth is at: 数据对象清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.数据对象清单.csv:
object_id,domain,name,business_definition,ddd_role,type_hierarchy,key_attributes,lifecycle,storage,constraint_tags,relationships,owner_module,source_of_truth,decision_refs,blocker_refs,open_question_refs,certainty,evidence
OBJ-cinemaai-001,cinemaai,ProductionProject,"A self-contained creative unit comprising script, cast, crew, schedule, assets, and AI-generated outputs for one anime/short-drama release. Serves as the top-level container for all production work.",aggregate_root,"{type: 'anime', discriminator: 'project_type'}|{type: 'short_drama'}",["project_id","project_type"],"Created on initiation; archived after final delivery and 90-day retention; immutable after 'delivered' state.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "90d", ttl: null},["single_source_of_truth","audit_required"],[{"type": "owns", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-002", "cardinality": "1..*", "boundary.same_transaction": true, "boundary.same_database": true, "boundary.same_service": true, "boundary.consistency_mode": "strong", "boundary.compensation_needed": false},{"type": "references", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-007", "cardinality": "1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": true}],production-core,"ProductionProject table in cinemaai_production schema","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.L12-L28","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.R01","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.B01",[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.L12-L28"
OBJ-cinemaai-002,cinemaai,Scene,"A discrete narrative unit within a ProductionProject, defined by location, time, characters, dialogue, and AI-generated visual/audio assets. May be generated, edited, or approved independently.",entity,null,["scene_id","project_id","scene_number"],"Created during script breakdown; updated through AI generation and editorial review; soft-deleted if rejected; retained for audit.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "indefinite", ttl: null},["audit_required"],[{"type": "belongs_to", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-001", "cardinality": "1", "boundary.same_transaction": true, "boundary.same_database": true, "boundary.same_service": true, "boundary.consistency_mode": "strong", "boundary.compensation_needed": false},{"type": "contains", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-003", "cardinality": "0..*", "boundary.same_transaction": true, "boundary.same_database": true, "boundary.same_service": true, "boundary.consistency_mode": "strong", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],production-core,"Scene table in cinemaai_production schema","[PRD-v0.4]§3.2.L5-L19","[PRD-v0.4]§3.2.R02",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§3.2.L5-L19"
OBJ-cinemaai-003,cinemaai,Shot,"A camera-facing atomic unit derived from a Scene — includes framing, motion, AI-generated image sequence (keyframes + interpolation), audio track, and timing metadata. Immutable once rendered.",value_object,null,["shot_id","scene_id","take_number"],"Created on render request; immutable post-render; retained with Scene.",{medium: "file_system", retention: "indefinite", ttl: null},["append_only","cache_friendly"],[{"type": "embedded_in", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-002", "cardinality": "1..*", "boundary.same_transaction": true, "boundary.same_database": true, "boundary.same_service": true, "boundary.consistency_mode": "strong", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],production-core,"S3 bucket 'cinemaai-shots' + ShotMetadata table","[PRD-v0.4]§3.3.L8-L22","[PRD-v0.4]§3.3.R03",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§3.3.L8-L22"
OBJ-cinemaai-004,cinemaai,CharacterProfile,"A reusable identity definition used across Scenes and Shots — includes name, visual traits (style, palette, proportions), voice model ID, personality tags, and behavioral constraints. Not tied to a single project.",aggregate_root,null,["character_id","version_hash"],"Created by character designer; versioned on update; active versions referenced by Scenes; deprecated versions retained for lineage.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "indefinite", ttl: null},["single_source_of_truth","read_heavy"],[{"type": "referenced_by", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-002", "cardinality": "0..*", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],asset-library,"CharacterProfile table in cinemaai_assets schema","[PRD-v0.4]§4.1.L3-L15","[PRD-v0.4]§4.1.R04",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§4.1.L3-L15"
OBJ-cinemaai-005,cinemaai,UserSession,"Stateful context of an authenticated user’s interaction with CinemaAI — includes active project, UI preferences, recent prompts, and temporary asset cache keys. Not persisted beyond session timeout.",service_data,null,["session_id","user_id"],"Created on login; expires after 24h inactivity or explicit logout; never archived.",{medium: "cache", retention: "24h", ttl: "86400"},["cache_friendly","write_heavy"],[{"type": "owned_by", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-006", "cardinality": "1", "boundary.same_transaction": true, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": true, "boundary.consistency_mode": "strong", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],ui-gateway,"Redis cluster 'cinema-session-store'","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L7-L14","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.R05",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L7-L14"
OBJ-cinemaai-006,cinemaai,UserProfile,"Persistent identity and permission data for a registered user — includes PII, role, subscription tier, API quota, and notification preferences.",aggregate_root,null,["user_id"],"Created on registration; updated on profile edit or tier change; hard-deleted on account deletion per GDPR.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "until_deletion", ttl: null},["pii","financial","audit_required","regulated"],[{"type": "owns", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-005", "cardinality": "1..*", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": true}],auth-service,"UserProfile table in cinemaai_auth schema","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L1-L12","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.R06","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.B02",[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L1-L12"
OBJ-cinemaai-007,cinemaai,LicensePackage,"A commercial entitlement granting usage rights for AI models, fonts, music, or stock assets — includes scope (per-project/per-seat), expiration, attribution requirements, and activation status.",entity,null,["license_id","package_code"],"Created on purchase or trial start; activated on first use; expires or revokes; retained for compliance reporting.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "7y", ttl: null},["regulated","audit_required","financial"],[{"type": "grants_access_to", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-004", "cardinality": "0..*", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": true}],billing,"LicensePackage table in cinemaai_billing schema","[PRD-v0.4]§6.3.L4-L16","[PRD-v0.4]§6.3.R07",[],[],"基于上下文推断","[PRD-v0.4]§6.3.L4-L16"
OBJ-cinemaai-008,cinemaai,GenerationJob,"An execution record for an AI rendering task — includes input prompt, model version, parameters, queue position, status, output asset refs, and error logs. Used for retry, monitoring, and cost attribution.",snapshot,null,["job_id","project_id","created_at"],"Created on job submission; status transitions tracked; retained for 30 days post-completion; purged automatically.",{medium: "nosql", retention: "30d", ttl: "2592000"},["append_only","audit_required"],[{"type": "triggers", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-003", "cardinality": "0..1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": true}],ai-engine,"Job document in 'cinemaai-jobs' MongoDB collection","[PRD-v0.4]§7.2.L10-L25","[PRD-v0.4]§7.2.R08",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§7.2.L10-L25"
OBJ-cinemaai-009,cinemaai,FeedbackThread,"A threaded discussion anchored to a specific Scene or Shot — includes creator, timestamps, annotations (frame-accurate), resolution status, and linked revision IDs.",aggregate_root,null,["thread_id","anchor_type","anchor_id"],"Created on annotation; closed on resolution or abandonment; retained for 2 years.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "2y", ttl: null},["audit_required"],[{"type": "anchored_to", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-002", "cardinality": "1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": false},{"type": "references", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-003", "cardinality": "0..1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],collab-service,"FeedbackThread table in cinemaai_collab schema","[PRD-v0.4]§8.1.L6-L18","[PRD-v0.4]§8.1.R09",[],[],"明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§8.1.L6-L18"
OBJ-cinemaai-010,cinemaai,Revision,"A versioned immutable snapshot of a Scene or Shot after human or AI modification — includes diff metadata, author, timestamp, and approval status. Supports rollback and A/B comparison.",snapshot,null,["revision_id","entity_type","entity_id","version_number"],"Created on save; immutable; retained for 1 year or until superseded by 5 newer revisions, whichever is longer.",{medium: "file_system", retention: "1y_or_5_revs", ttl: null},["append_only","audit_required"],[{"type": "derived_from", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-002", "cardinality": "1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": false},{"type": "approved_by", "target": "OBJ-cinemaai-006", "cardinality": "0..1", "boundary.same_transaction": false, "boundary.same_database": false, "boundary.same_service": false, "boundary.consistency_mode": "eventual", "boundary.compensation_needed": false}],production-core,"S3 'cinemaai-revisions' + RevisionLog table","[PRD-v0.4]§9.2.L3-L14","[PRD-v0.4]§9.2.R10",[],[],"基于上下文推断","[PRD-v0.4]§9.2.L3-L14"
